text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Huh? No way! My skin looks terrible!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I've been getting enough sleep and applying
moisturizer! So why?!
choice_data_list:
Are there any feng shui remedies you could
use?

Are there any feng shui remedies you could
use?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
In feng shui, it's said that places where water is
unbalanced in your home can cause skin
problems. You know, places like water pipes,
sinks, and washbasins.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I've been so busy lately that I haven't checked
those areas in a few days. That all ends now,
though!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I'll start by checking the north where the water qi
is strongest, followed by water's counter, earth, in
the southwest! It's time to make things
Rickey-right!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Watching her leave with a dejected look on her
face, I hope that her skin problems clear up as
fast as possible.
